hero.title: Mercy and Health
hero.description: Saving lives and bringing victory closer by providing veterans and medics on the front line with everything they need.

footer.rights: All rights reserved © 2026 CF "Mercy and Health"

history.title: Our History
history.content: Founded in 2016, our foundation has grown from a local initiative into a large-scale organization. Since February 2022, we have been operating 24/7. Today, we are one of the largest suppliers of specialized transport for the Armed Forces of Ukraine.

mission.title: Mission and Values
mission.content: We believe that no one should be left alone with their trouble. Our mission is to be a reliable rear for those on the front line and to provide comprehensive rehabilitation for those who have returned.

items.title: Ambulances for the Front
items.description: Over 200 specialized vehicles have already been delivered to save the lives of our defenders.

items.title: Project 'On the Shield'
items.description: Providing refrigerated trucks for the dignified transportation of fallen Heroes.

items.title: Rehabilitation Center
items.description: Free psychological and physical assistance to military personnel and their families.

reports.title: Reporting
reports.description: We believe in full transparency. Our goal is to be a reliable rear for those on the front line.

items.title: Mobile psychological groups operate in 4 regions of Ukraine
Support program for children of fallen defenders: teenage club
Assistance to orphanages and facilities for the elderly
